name: M Tr
text: Think you have to go in to order, i called three time with no answer.

name: Wendy Murphey
text: Loved the Cristmas spirit displayed by the bartender - food was excellent and service was fast & friendly.

name: JJ O
text: Delicious bacon burger and fresh brewed ice tea. Attentive server.

name: Allen Partin
text: Great place. Good prices and food.

name: Rodney Poore
text: Best Breakfast in town.

name: Michael Crisman
text: Good service & food.

name: Eric Larsen
text: Great lunch spot! Service is always good.

name: Kristin Lange
text: Great food!

name: Jas F
text: Super place for great food and excellent service. Not fancy but a wonderful spot to chat with neighbors and friends!

name: Lee Arroyo
text: Great breakfast, great food, service is fantastic and people are lovely.

name: Rocco Filippi
text:
So we take a motorcycle ride up to More Brewing in Huntley and run into this very nice barkeep. We told her where we were going to eat while in town. She suggested Sammy's. So we gave them a try.
What a delightful surprise. All 4 of us were happy with the quick service and the waitress was on it when we made changes to our order from what was on the menu. "No problem!" she told us every time we added or deleted something that came in our choices. Drinks were delivered asap. And when the food arrived I was thinking how I was going to try and eat all of it there was so much.
The whole time we were there she came over and asked us if we needed anything. My cup of coffee never got empty. And her personality was right up there with the old "down home small town" theme. We had a wonderful conversation with her. She introduced us to not only the other waitress as we went along but with all the talk of how we really enjoyed the food and service she had the owner/cook come out and we forwarded our opinion to him and expressed how we felt. I then told them that I HAD to leave a review with context to the entire experience.
I would have to say as many greasy spoons as I have been to this one is at the top of my list. And the people with me would agree to that I am sure. If your in the mood for some great breakfast with good people and are really hungry this is the place for you. Oh, and did I say the prices were actually lower for once than what we received in return?!

name: Nichole Claude
text:
Been here a few times, everything I have had so far was delicious. Employees are also friendly and inviting.
dan krause 6 months ago on Google
We stopped in for dinner and a drink. I had what turned out to be the best hamburger I have had in months. Obviously made fresh, it came with fries that were almost as good. My wife had a gyro sandwich that was, according to her, as good as my burger. My drink wasl larger than I expected, but proved to be as good as the burger. The bar tended to be a little noisy at times, but what the hell, this is a bar. I also had to give five stars for the great service from the lady who also had to tend bar. The place is obviously worth coming back to, and we definitely will!

name: Debbie Malley
text: GREAT food...EXCELLENT service...THANKS jessica!!!

name: Antwaun Howard
text: The owner, staff, patrons are all awesome. My favorite bar in Huntley.

name: Allen Halterman
text: It might not look like much from the outside, but this is a place not to miss! The staff is incredibly attentive and is able to offer solid recommendations for both food and drink. We don't live in the area, but we will come back every time we're visiting!

name: Katie Smith
text:
Hidden gem. You wouldn't think it driving up but this place is literally AMAZING. Parking behind building provides plenty of spots and can enter through back door.
Very very very friendly staff.
Very delicious food.
Amazing selection of food.
Coffee is delicious
Love love love love this place. New favorite spot!

name: James Dunavan
text: The staff were friendly and got our order quickly. The food was great. I will definitely be coming here to eat more often.

name: Susan Castle
text: Great food, fun atmosphere!

name: Amanda/Vince
text: Best breakfast in town! Very reasonable prices.

name: Donna Addleman
text: Food was delicious!! Well worth the trip. Sports bar atmosphere. A little noisy for conversation but doable.

name: Buffy Yatos
text: Best breakfast in town!
recommendedDishes: Italian Omelette, Biscuits and Gravy, 2 Eggs, 4 Pieces French Toast, Ribeye Steak N' Eggs, Eggs Benedict, Corned Beef Hash Omelet, Side of Hash Browns, Breakfast Burrito

name: Megan Van
text: Drinks were wonderful, food was even better. The portion sizes are huge. Staff was attentive and very friendly. 10/10 would be an understatement!

name: Thomas Pearson
text: Best breakfast in Huntley...
recommendedDishes: Biscuits and Gravy, 2 Eggs, Side of Hash Browns, Stuffed French Toast

name: Megan Tinsley
text:
We stopped in late after a long day, drawn by the good reviews, and we were not disappointed! The curly fries were perfectly cooked, and my husband's tater tots were excellent. The vegetable soup was wonderful, and the pulled pork sandwich was tasty. It's a great local spot with delicious food. I would definitely stop in again. Thanks!
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Dinner

name: Stephanie Hancock
text: A hidden little gem. Food is good quality and cooked with care. Good menu. Good service. Love bringing guests here.

name: Jay Boss
text: Nice lil spot for bite to eat portions and food was good service and atmosphere was wonderful as well.

name: Thomas Scanlon
text: Food good.

name: Elayna Garcia
text: Love the atmosphere here! Really gives you the small town bar with many welcoming faces as soon as you step foot into the establishment. And it’s always better when I see Lola on the clock:).

name: John Adamowski
text: Great breakfast all day.

name: Ed Wellhausen
text: It's a great low end bar.

name: Kelsey Waughon
text: Love going to Sammy's on Tuesdays for karaoke night. The food and the service are great!

name: DOREEN MCINTIRE
recommendedDishes: Fried Shrimp with Curly Fries, Wings, Eggs Benedict

name: Dennis Smart
text: Friendly staff.

name: Michael Barreto
text:
Great food. Great service. Atmosphere is just a small bar type diner but it’s cozy old Huntley as it gets.
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Breakfast
Price per person: $10–20

name: Juan Arreola
text: Food was OK, I would say slightly overcooked. We came in for breakfast but don't think we would be back for breakfast.

name: Peter Nardella
text: Local neighborhood bar, I thought, but then I ate also. Great food and a step above bar food. LARGE portions with great flavors. All Orchestrated by Micky, our bartender, who kept everyone's drink full and put smiles on everyone's face.

name: Terry McKinch
text: Typical bar food, nothing special.

name: Denise Andren
text: OMG the pretzel appetizer is HUGE!! It is very good. Went for the fish fry and was not disappointed. You get a lot of food for a very reasonable price. I really like Sammy's.
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Pretzel, Biscuits and Gravy

name: Adam Godwin
text: Absolutely love Sammys; they’re the best. Food is amazing and well-priced. Staff is very friendly and gives great service. The atmosphere is awesome. They will have live bands which are always entertaining, and dart nights which are fun. 10/10 recommend.

name: Mystic Moose
text: Our first time here, said best breakfast in town, I believe it.

name: Rick Ciesla
text: Finally made it out here. Fish fry was great, service very good. Place had a really friendly atmosphere, almost small town feel. I will be back to try the breakfast soon. Recommended.

name: Derek Petrucci Jr
text: Great family place , good is fantastic. Sammy is one of the best guys around hands down Sammy’s is home . Whether you just hang out have a drink or pull up with your girl listen to the bands . Hang out with your family or friends. Great casual place with a great atmosphere.
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Fried Shrimp with Curly Fries, Italian Omelette, Cheese Curds, Pretzel, Wings, Biscuits and Gravy, 2 Eggs, Soft Shell Tacos, Mozzarella Sticks, 4 Pieces French Toast, Ribeye Steak N' Eggs, Eggs Benedict, Corned Beef Hash Omelet, Side of Hash Browns, Hickory Burger, Breakfast Burrito, Pizza Omelette

name: Keith Rodgers
text: Great place to unwind. The staff and owners are very friendly. Tell Mickey and Kate said hi!

name: Dan zukowski
text: Usually no wait on a table the food is good the bar can get loud but again it's a bar the wait staff is friendly the food comes out quickly!! Top notch burgers too!!
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Fried Shrimp with Curly Fries, Cheese Curds, Mozzarella Sticks, Corned Beef Hash Omelet, Side of Hash Browns, Pizza Omelette

name: Paul Forslund
text: Great little hole in the wall locally.

name: Murugs Lingaswamy
text: People are very friendly. Very relaxed environment(more retired people too) with music, food and drinks with decent service,.

name: Susan Lee
text: Prices are reasonable and they give generous portions of good food. Nice menu.

name: Bee O'Brien
text: They advertise as "Best breakfast in Huntley", and it lives up to the claim. Good food and the servers are friendly and efficient. And I can't get over the fresh fruit with breakfast.... Yum. (not the usual dry melons).

name: Katryn Lotto
text: This is a hidden gem. Service was fantastic, the ingredients were very fresh throughout and we both enjoyed the breakfasts we had. Prices are also reasonable. We will definitely be going back. We want to try lunch next!

name: Carolyn Beranek
text:
The Fish Fry was very delicious.
Had the tater tots with clam chowder soup, which was the best we have ever had.
The only fault I had was the fish fell away from the breading. But that was a small con compared to the taste, and the service was excellent.
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots

name: Cheri Moehling
text: Great gathering place for family and friends.

name: Chef Consultant
text:
Great little bar. Friendly staff & good quick bar food. Outdoor seating is available.
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Other
Price per person: $10–20

name: Derek Knight
text: Really nice friendly family restaurant and bar. Great place for breakfast, and Friday fish fry’s.

name: Dan Lockwitz
text: Mike and Diane have a great place in Huntley! Enjoyed the food, friendly service and listening to the music of the New Odyssey Guy.

name: Melissa Sanchez-Fischer
text: The Mickey Mouse pancakes and attention to kids was great. There were no groans as we entered which was a change. Biscuits and gravy were average. Ham egg omelette - surprisingly delicious !

name: Matthew Steichmann
text: Nice place. Comfortable, family atmosphere, good food and decent prices. Like a good diner, only bigger.

name: Andrew Szekely
text: Everything you'd want in a hometown bar and restaurant!

name: Bob Eccker
text: I love this place! Great breakfast at fair price.

name: Maria Lourdes H.
text: Love the Fish Fry all you can eat...atmosphere is awesome.
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots

name: Pat Lawlor
text: My veggie omelet was yummy with generous refills of drinks.

name: Victor Zambetti
text:
Great place to eat.
Meal type: Breakfast
kyle bennett 2 years ago on Google

name: Theresa Rode
text: Great place for breakfast. Awesome food!!! Nice big portions, plus great prices. I need to try it for dinner. I almost forgot to mention, toast... like bakery bread. Must try the marble rye.

name: Tom Hess
text: Was rushed by waiter. And when I said we're you in a hurry he told me the kitchen was slow and needed something to do.
recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots

name: Gayle Nowakowski
text: I had perfectly poached eggs! So many restaurants cannot seem to poach eggs properly. Hash brown nice and crispy. Excellent service.

name: LUIS NARANJO
text: Good food.

name: Len Hansen
text: Super friendly staff, great soup and sandwiches!

name: Jon Brudzinski
text: Great place to visit.

name: David Vincent
text: Sammy's is a great place where you will not leave hungry. There are very typical selections of bar food here and a pile of it all appears to be made in house, it's really tasty. The service is great, to the point where the waitress recognized my friends, who are regulars, and knew what their orders would be. She recognized that I was not a regular and spent extra time ensuring she would get my order correct. Always looking forward to my next visit.

name: Julie Duvall
text: Great Breakfast.

name: Dr Don Stien
text: Food was good, service was VERY slow. Had to keep asking to refill my coffee because the food took forever to come to the table and there were hardly any customers in the place. It was like all the workers were still asleep and working in slow motion. Don't think I will be back anytime soon if at all. BRUNCH CAFE beats the living daylights out of this place. BRUNCH CAFE Is a few dollars more BUT WELL WORTH IT!!!

name: Steven Always Trying New Things
text:
Food is always good.
Like that they serve breakfast all day and night.

name: Wes Motley
text: Great food and very friendly atmosphere.

name: June Jones
text: Karaoke night was fun! Good down home food, great laid back atmosphere. Geared for the older crowd, so nice to have a comfy place to go!

name: Marty haugland
text:
Pizza omelet bursting with fresh ingredients.
Jen quick with coffee refills. Very generous portions, reasonable prices.

name: Richter Awning
text: Always a fun time !

name:
Enjoyed the fish fry
Tammy Spantiko
Bob Reed
text: Good times...great food specials and good bands play on the weekends.

name: Nick Sanchez
text: Go hawks!!!! Always a good time nice big home town bar, great price, best happy hour.
